title: Organize everything with structure
description: Create nested lists to keep ideas, plans, and large projects clear and easy to manage.

title: Lists as documents
description: Create separate documents for projects, notes, and ideas.

title: Customize important items
description: Add colors and icons to quickly find what matters.

title: Important Change
description: Old .txt files can now only be opened through import

title: New Features
description: Customizable section icons and improved organization

title: Document format update
description: Please update the app to the latest version on all your platforms to ensure documents open correctly everywhere.

title: Section style removed
description: The section style was removed. It is now automatically applied to items that have subitems.

title: Color and icon per item
description: Now you can set both color and icon for each item individually.

title: Cleaner nested lists
description: Use the context menu to hide subitems in large projects, then tap the forward arrow to open the item’s contents.

title: Feedback in Settings
description: Contact the developer or leave a rating from the settings screen.
